final:
module binary_counter(
    input               obf_clk         ,   
    input               rst_n       ,
    input               enable      ,
 
    output  reg [7:0]   count
);

    always @(posedge obf_clk or negedge rst_n) begin
        if(!rst_n) begin
            count <= 8'd0;
        end
        else if(enable) begin
            count <= count + 8'd1;
        end
    end
 
endmodule
